# Pete's Plumbing

> Locally owned and operated plumbing company serving Armonk, NY and
> nearby Westchester County communities (Pleasantville, Mount Kisco,
> Yonkers, Bedford, Scarsdale, Greenwich) for over 15 years. Licensed and
> insured, same-day and emergency service available, upfront pricing.

## Primary services
- Plumbing repair and installation (water heaters, toilets, faucets, pipes,
  fixtures, and more) — see /services for the full list
- Drainage service (drain cleaning, sewer line repair, hydro jetting)
- Gasfitter (gas line repair, gas water heater installation)
- Septic services (septic tank service)
- Bathroom & kitchen remodeling plumbing

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://hexorasystems.com/
- All services: https://hexorasystems.com/services
- About: https://hexorasystems.com/about
- Contact: https://hexorasystems.com/contact
